name: BasementVR
developer: Adam Roszyk, Mariusz Lewandowski, Karol Anioła
short_description: VR space as cool as you. It's like inviting friends for a VR sleepover! Hang out in VR - create, talk and watch YouTube. Customize your own social room, meet new friends, explore rooms for inspiration and cool stuff.
detailed_description:
FEATURE LIST

  • Online multiplayer - so you can meet people from all around the world, and also be discovered by them.
  • Embedded Web Browser - so you can read use any online resource which you currently need.
  • World is persistent - so anything you will made will be here to stay.
  • Voice Chat
  • 3d Brushes
  • Gif and Photos search engine
  • Variety of 3d shapes to use


About the Software

Be Creative. Be Social. Explore!


BasementVR gives you the possibility to express yourself in your own room with 3d drawing, objects and various media types such as images and gifs.
Invite friends and create together, talk, watch YouTube and browse web.

- Create and have fun
- Work and brainstorm
- Showcase your artworks
- Explore rooms of other users
